channel.title: DHCP Snooping on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in DHCP Snooping on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Importance of Physical Security
item.category: "Network PLus Certification Course" , "Physical Security" , "Network Protection" , "IT Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Data Security" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Access Control" , "Network Devices" , "IT Training"
item.description: Enhance your understanding of physical security and its significance in network protection with this comprehensive Network+ course. Learn best practices for implementation, switchport security, password complexity enforcement, and more.
